title: Royal Bathrooms Elena 600mm 2 Door Floor Standing Vanity Unit Storage Cabinet with Semi Recessed Basin - Charcoal Oak
features: Vanity Unit Come with contemporary soft square curves that create a neat, elegant, and modern look. Supplied rigid and fully assembled, it ensures a quick and hassle-free installation with no visible pipework, only the plinth needs to be cut out for the basin fittings, making it ready to enhance your bathroom with style and convenience.

2 Door Floor Standing Vanity Unit with Charcoal Oak Finish which makes it more Shiny and Bright. Highly beneficial with the space saving, Compact design for Smaller spaces, Ensuites and Cloakrooms with ample storage for toiletries and cleaning supplies.
Soft Close Door mechanism, Moisture-Resistant 18mm MFC material for Vanity Unit & High Quality Vitreous China Semi Recessed Basin with Pre Drilled 1 Tap Hole.

We keep a lot of indispensable items in the bathroom so it’s really important that we’ve got somewhere to put them all. This is where our vanity unit has its biggest advantage over a basin and pedestal, with storage under the basin; you'll have extra room to keep anything you didn't want to leave on display.
You will feel proud on having our product. Supplied with an Excellent 5 Year Manufacturers Guarantee.
description: Product Description Package Includes 1 x Vanity Unit 1 x Ceramic basin 2 Door Vanity Unit Free Standing Vanity Unit 18mm Moisture-Resistant MDF /MFC Material Hidden Fixings & Hinges for Smooth Finish Gloss White Ceramic basin Pre-drilled Single Tap Hole 2 Soft Close Door with 2 Internal Shelf Compartment Chrome Finish Handle Please Note: We are unable to ship this item to following postcodes: AB, BT, DD, GY, HS, IM, IV, JE, KW, PA, PH, ZE, KA27, KA28 & Isle of Wight (PO30-PO41) This pre-assembled vanity includes an Ceramic sink top. Adjustable Hinges allow you to easily align the cabinet doors after installation Pre Drilled Single Tap Hole Basin Soft Close Door Advanced soft close technology ensures quiet and gentle door closures. Eliminates noise and prevents slamming, enhancing overall peace and tranquility. Adds modern convenience and sophistication to your living space. Fully Assembled Fully Assembled - Just plinth needs to cut out for the basin fitting. Crafted for durability and a seamless finish. Pre-Drilled Tap Hole: Simplifies faucet installation Ceramic basin Ceramic basins with a sleek gloss white finish offer a durable, scratch-resistant surface. They are easy to clean due to their smooth, non-porous surface. Under the Sink Storage Under-sink storage seamlessly enhances bathroom aesthetics. Maximizes space for toiletries and essentials in a tidy manner. Adds sophistication and style to your bathroom decor. Sleek Design Handle Durable Stainless Steel Construction ensures long-lasting performance and resistance to corrosion. Finger Pull Handle design available in chrome for a sleek, modern look. These handles designed provide a comfortable grip and ease of use Predrill Tap Hole Pre-drilled single tap hole in our vanity units simplifies faucet installation, ensuring a hassle-free setup process Designed to securely accommodate a single tap, providing stability and functionality while enhancing the vanity unit's overall usability 600mm 600mm 600mm 600mm Add To Basket Buying Options Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 3.1 out of 5 stars 12 3.1 out of 5 stars 12 3.1 out of 5 stars 12 3.1 out of 5 stars 12 Price £171.99 £ 171 . 99 — no data £171.99 £ 171 . 99 £171.99 £ 171 . 99 Number Of Shelves 2 2 2 2 Finish Type Indigo Grey Gloss Grey Elm Hale Black Gloss White Number Of Doors 2 2 2 2 Material Engineered Wood Engineered Wood Engineered Wood Engineered Wood Pre Assemble & Pre Drill Top Yes Yes Yes Yes Easy To Install ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Size 600mm 600mm 600mm 600mm Installation type Free Standing Free Standing Free Standing Free Standing Special Features ‎Durability,Sturdy ‎Durability,Sturdy ‎Durability,Sturdy ‎Durability,Sturdy Handle Finish Chrome Chrome Chrome Chrome
